title: Typed Async Work, Platform APIs, and Cancellation · Diagnostic Repair Bay
summary: Coordinate public-data requests, cancellation, retries, and UI state across browser and server boundaries. Learners isolate plausible failures, compare competing hypotheses, and record cause-level repair evidence. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in a typed cancellable data coordinator and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Model promise fulfillment values and rejection handling without pretending rejected types are encoded in Promise.
Predict async return inference and retain discriminated result relationships across awaits.
Propagate AbortSignal and distinguish cancellation, timeout, transport, parsing, and domain failures.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
